# Rankflow UI

Rankflow UI is a high-fidelity library of UI components built for React and Next.js. It focuses on premium aesthetics, smooth animations (via Framer Motion), and developer convenience.

## Core Technologies
- **Framework**: Next.js 16 (App Router)
- **Runtime**: React 19
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4
- **Animation**: motion/react (Framer Motion 12)
- **Icons**: React Icons, Lucide, Radix UI

## Components Summary

### Buttons
- **Animated Border Button**: Moving gradient border using CSS offset-path.
- **Noise Button**: 3D pill button with canvas noise texture and magic-wand icon.
- **Glow Button**: Vibrant hover glow states (orange, red, blue, green).
- **Gradient Button**: Continuously moving random background gradients.
- **Social Share Button**: Neomorphic button that reveals social icons on hover with spring layout transitions.

### Cards
- **Spotlight Card**: Dark mode cards with a ray-tracing style spotlight that follows the cursor.
- **Gradient Ring Card**: Rotating conic gradient ring around a glassmorphism card.
- **Stack Card**: Smoothly rotating card stack with alternating orientations.
- **Tweet Card**: High-fidelity pixel-perfect Twitter/X post reconstruction.

### Interactive Blocks
- **Sign Up Form**: Split-screen auth block with an automatic morphing testimonial box.
- **Pricing Plan**: Three-tier pricing grid with slot-machine price animations and currency toggles.
- **AI Input**: Sophisticated prompt input with file attachments and voice capture support.
- **Marquee**: Infinite horizontal scroller with magnetic hover slowing.
- **Command Palette (Cmd+K)**: Fuzzy search modal with keyboard navigation and recent item memory.

## URLs & Navigation
- **Homepage**: https://ui.rankflow.in/
- **Templates**: https://ui.rankflow.in/templates
- **Docs Root**: https://ui.rankflow.in/docs
- **Component Docs**: /docs/components/[name] (e.g. /docs/components/sign-up-form)

## Usage Pattern
All components are available in the registry for direct integration.
```bash
npx rankflow add [component-name]
```
Or manual copy-paste from `/registry/components/`.
